items.name_en: In stock 25C Hobo Bag - Denim Small
items.name_cn:
In stock 25C Hobo Bag - Denim Small
This bag is surprisingly light and beautiful in person. It has four slip pockets 👝, giving the whole bag a lot of energy. The chain is chunky, but the bag feels light on the shoulder. It's the kind of bag you can grab and go 😎. The body is made of lambskin, and the hardware is vintage, looking super textured!!! The capacity is huge; it can fit a large phone, sunglasses 🕶️, and more... It's not small at all. Highly recommended for daily use or taking photos 👍👍
Size: 22*31*15*cm
Model: AS5339

specs.rawTitle:

This bag is surprisingly light and beautiful in person. It has four slip pockets 👝, giving the whole bag a lot of energy. The chain is chunky, but the bag feels light on the shoulder. The capacity is huge; it can fit a large phone, sunglasses 🕶️, and more... It's not small at all. Highly recommended for daily use or taking photos 👍👍
Size: 22*31*15*cm
Model: AS5339

items.name_en: 🆕22 Handbag Black Silver
items.name_cn:
🆕22 Handbag Black Silver
 Original box calfskin grade A👍 Fine and glossy leather,
Soft yet durable, possessing both qualities
Simple appearance hiding many designer's high-end designs, hollow Chanel logo coins, small embellishments elevate the overall temperament by more than one level, full of retro sentiment, a relaxed lazy vibe! 🍃
Dimensions: 39*42*8cm
